A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.title: The Hedge Knight
A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.overview: On his journey to the forthcoming tournament in Ashford, Dunk meets a clever young boy named Egg, who offers to be his squire.

A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.title: Hard Salt Beef
A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.overview: Dunk appeals to various lords in order to gain entrance into the tournament...but Egg advises him to hold onto his pride. When the Targaryens arrive at Ashford, Dunk seizes his moment with Prince Baelor.

A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.title: The Squire
A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.overview: After Egg attempts to train Dunk's uncooperative horse, Dunk teaches his new squire an important skill. As they take in the tourney's first full day of events, Dunk receives a proposition from the Ashford steward that could help secure his future.

A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.title: Seven
A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.overview: After landing himself in the Targaryens' crosshairs, Dunk exercises his right to request a trial by combat. But when Aerion insists on a trial of seven instead, Dunk is faced with the daunting task of finding six others to fight alongside him.

A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.title: In the Name of the Mother
A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.overview: Dunk's mettle is put to the test in the brutal trial of seven. Years earlier, Dunk finds himself drawn to the promise of a new future.

A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.title: The Morrow
A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms__S1.overview: As Ashford mourns a great loss, Dunk considers his next move...and whether to keep Egg as his squire.

Stranger Things__S1.title: Chapter One: The Vanishing of Will Byers
Stranger Things__S1.overview: On his way home from a friend's house, young Will sees something terrifying. Nearby, a sinister secret lurks in the depths of a government lab.

Stranger Things__S1.title: Chapter Two: The Weirdo on Maple Street
Stranger Things__S1.overview: Lucas, Mike and Dustin try to talk to the girl they found in the woods. Hopper questions an anxious Joyce about an unsettling phone call.

Stranger Things__S1.title: Chapter Three: Holly, Jolly
Stranger Things__S1.overview: An increasingly concerned Nancy looks for Barb and finds out what Jonathan's been up to. Joyce is convinced Will is trying to talk to her.

Stranger Things__S1.title: Chapter Four: The Body
Stranger Things__S1.overview: Refusing to believe Will is dead, Joyce tries to connect with her son. The boys give Eleven a makeover. Nancy and Jonathan form an unlikely alliance.

Stranger Things__S1.title: Chapter Five: The Flea and the Acrobat
Stranger Things__S1.overview: Hopper breaks into the lab while Nancy and Jonathan confront the force that took Will. The boys ask Mr. Clarke how to travel to another dimension.

Stranger Things__S1.title: Chapter Six: The Monster
Stranger Things__S1.overview: A frantic Jonathan looks for Nancy in the darkness, but Steve's looking for her, too. Hopper and Joyce uncover the truth about the lab's experiments.

Stranger Things__S1.title: Chapter Seven: The Bathtub
Stranger Things__S1.overview: Eleven struggles to reach Will, while Lucas warns that "the bad men are coming." Nancy and Jonathan show the police what Jonathan caught on camera.

Stranger Things__S1.title: Chapter Eight: The Upside Down
Stranger Things__S1.overview: Dr. Brenner holds Hopper and Joyce for questioning while the boys wait with Eleven in the gym. Back at Will's, Nancy and Jonathan prepare for battle.

It-Welcome to Derry__S1.title: The Pilot
It-Welcome to Derry__S1.overview: As four misfit kids vow to find their missing classmate, Major Leroy Hanlon arrives to a mixed reception at Derry Air Force Base.

It-Welcome to Derry__S1.title: The Thing in the Dark
It-Welcome to Derry__S1.overview: While Charlotte and Will navigate their new life in Derry, Ronnie worries about her father's fate.

It-Welcome to Derry__S1.title: Now You See It
It-Welcome to Derry__S1.overview: As Leroy, Pauly, and Dick search for a new dig site, the kids attempt to get visual proof of the phenomena they've been experiencing.

It-Welcome to Derry__S1.title: The Great Swirling Apparatus of Our Planet's Function
It-Welcome to Derry__S1.overview: As the kids face increasingly terrifying experiences, Charlotte attempts to advocate for Hank, and General Shaw escalates his efforts.

It-Welcome to Derry__S1.title: Neibolt Street
It-Welcome to Derry__S1.overview: As the military descends on Neibolt Street, the kids head into the sewers with their own objective.

It-Welcome to Derry__S1.title: In the Name of the Father
It-Welcome to Derry__S1.overview: Plagued by dark visions, Dick gets a surprise at the Black Spot. Meanwhile, the kids each face their own challenges.

It-Welcome to Derry__S1.title: The Black Spot
It-Welcome to Derry__S1.overview: A vigilante attack on the Black Spot unleashes long dormant forces. In the aftermath, Dick helps uncover another crucial artifact.

It-Welcome to Derry__S1.title: Winter Fire
It-Welcome to Derry__S1.overview: As a dense fog engulfs the town – and General Shaw pushes ahead with his mission – the Hanlons, Rose, Dick, and the kids must work together to save Derry.

Loki__S1.title: Glorious Purpose
Loki__S1.overview: After stealing the Tesseract in "Avengers: Endgame," Loki lands before the Time Variance Authority.

Loki__S1.title: The Variant
Loki__S1.overview: Mobius puts Loki to work, but not everyone at TVA is thrilled about the God of Mischief's presence.

Loki__S1.title: Lamentis
Loki__S1.overview: Loki finds out The Variant's plans, but he has his own that will forever alter both their destinies.

Loki__S1.title: The Nexus Event
Loki__S1.overview: Frayed nerves and paranoia infiltrate the TVA as Mobius and Hunter B-15 search for Loki and Sylvie.

Loki__S1.title: Journey into Mystery
Loki__S1.overview: Loki tries to escape The Void, a desolate purgatory where he meets variant versions of himself.

Loki__S1.title: For All Time. Always.
Loki__S1.overview: The clock is ticking in the season finale which finds Loki and Sylvie on a date with destiny.

WandaVision__S1.title: Filmed Before a Live Studio Audience
WandaVision__S1.overview: Wanda and Vision struggle to conceal their powers during dinner with Vision’s boss and his wife.

WandaVision__S1.title: Don't Touch That Dial
WandaVision__S1.overview: In an effort to fit in, Wanda and Vision perform a magic act in their community talent show.

WandaVision__S1.title: Now in Color
WandaVision__S1.overview: Wanda's pregnancy fritzes her powers as she and Vision prepare for an accelerated delivery.

WandaVision__S1.title: We Interrupt This Program
WandaVision__S1.overview: Monica Rambeau, tasked with a special assignment regarding sentient weapons, goes missing.

WandaVision__S1.title: On a Very Special Episode...
WandaVision__S1.overview: Wanda addresses Vision's worries when he grows suspicious of the neighbors' strange behavior.

WandaVision__S1.title: All-New Halloween Spooktacular!
WandaVision__S1.overview: Disturbances on Halloween separate Wanda from Vision, who looks into anomalous activity in Westview.

WandaVision__S1.title: Breaking the Fourth Wall
WandaVision__S1.overview: Monica plots her return to the anomaly while Wanda navigates a slew of unsettling complications, and Vision forms a new alliance to help.

WandaVision__S1.title: Previously On
WandaVision__S1.overview: Wanda embarks on a troubling journey revisiting her past for insight into her present and future.

WandaVision__S1.title: The Series Finale
WandaVision__S1.overview: The events of WandaVision come to a head, and the destinies of all who took part are determined.

Cheesecake__S1.title: Gone to the Dogs
Cheesecake__S1.overview: Episode 1: Neel and Sameera are struggling to strike a balance in their professional and mundane personal lives. Sameera gets upset over not getting a promotion and coincidentally, Neel gets his big career break. Sameera decides to take the much-anticipated trip for their third marriage anniversary and starts planning. Neel needs to focus on his big opportunity and doesn’t have the time for a trip. As they argue over it, they get distracted by something unexpected - a dog inside their house.

Cheesecake__S1.title: In the Dog House
Cheesecake__S1.overview: Neel and Sameera take a day off to settle the dog to a shelter home. They meet Mirza, a 55-year-old passionate dog lover, who runs a private shelter home. As he explains to them the reality of shelter homes, they both decided not to put Cheesecake in one. They agree to put Cheesecake up for adoption. In the process, they spend more time with each other and hear each other out. They end up getting to know the dog gradually as they begin to spend time with it.

Cheesecake__S1.title: Sick as a DOG
Cheesecake__S1.overview: As Neel and Sameer leave for their work, Cheesecake is all alone in the house. It creates nuisance in the house and for the other members of the building. Clueless about the dog's condition, both Neel and Sameera end up going to an Animal Communicator who makes them realize that the dogs are a much more evolved species than humans. Amidst all of this, they learn a thing or two about their own relationship.

Cheesecake__S1.title: All Bark and no Bite
Cheesecake__S1.overview: Megha suggests Neel and Sameera to meet a family, who is willing to adopt Cheesecake. There is a slight unease as Neel and Sameera reluctantly agree to meet the prospective adopters. As they arrive, Neel and Sameera play warm hosts to the family and find them to be affectionate towards the pet. All seems perfect, but in an unexpected twist, Neel starts feeling uneasy when Cheesecake is forced to do popular dog tricks. Will they give away Cheesecake or will they make him a part of their own lives?

Cheesecake__S1.title: Like a Dog with Two Tails
Cheesecake__S1.overview: Neel, Sameera, and Cheesecake are a happy family. Things take a different turn when a road accident leads them to stumble upon Cheesecake's past life. Out of curiosity, they land up at the doorsteps of the family that once owned Cheesecake. A startling revelation hits them as they meet with the original owners. It leads them to a point where a crucial decision needs to be taken - whether to continue with Cheesecake or giving him away.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 1
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: When an elite assassin carries out a kill, it catches the attention of an intelligence officer, who starts to hunt him down.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 2
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: With his client backing out of payment, the Jackal's reputation is on the line, and he starts to plot his revenge.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 3
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 4
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: His vengeance fulfilled, the Jackal flees Munich and tries to quell Nuria's suspicions. Bianca follows a new lead in her hunt.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 5
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: The Jackal visits Norman with a special commission... but with Bianca also tracking Norman down, she is starting to close in on him.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 6
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: Following his shootout with Bianca, the Jackal must escape his captors and regroup ahead of his next hit, as Bianca follows his trail.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 7
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: The Jackal and Bianca head to Tallinn before UDC's announcement. The Jackal must use all his wiles as he prepares to take his shot.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 8
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: Bianca gains insight into a secret file. She learns the true identity of the Jackal and how he became a contract killer.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 9
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: With the release of River imminent, UDC believes himself safe. As time runs out, the Jackal must use all his skills to reach his target.

The Day of the Jackal__S1.title: Episode 10
The Day of the Jackal__S1.overview: A wanted man, the Jackal is on the run, desperate to get back to Nuria, but Bianca is given one last shot to bring him to justice.

The Last of Us__S1.title: When You're Lost in the Darkness
The Last of Us__S1.overview: 2003. As a parasitic fungal outbreak begins to ravage the country and the world, Joel Miller attempts to escape the escalating chaos with his daughter and brother. Twenty years later, a now hardened Joel and his partner Tess fight to survive under a totalitarian regime, while the insurgent Fireflies harbor a teenage girl with a unique gift.

The Last of Us__S1.title: Infected
The Last of Us__S1.overview: In 2003, an Indonesian scientist makes a devastating discovery. In 2023, now outside of the quarantine zone, Joel and Tess clash over Ellie's fate as they navigate a long-abandoned Boston overrun with Infected.

The Last of Us__S1.title: Long, Long Time
The Last of Us__S1.overview: Doomsday prepper Bill prepares to ride out the apocalypse alone...until a mysterious stranger upends his plans. Years later, Joel and Ellie seek Bill's guidance – and find themselves at a crossroads.

The Last of Us__S1.title: Please Hold to My Hand
The Last of Us__S1.overview: After a harrowing trek across a desolate United States, Joel and Ellie find themselves navigating a dangerous Kansas City on foot. Later, rebel leader Kathleen instigates a manhunt – one that pits her violent civilian militia against the world's best hope.

The Last of Us__S1.title: Endure and Survive
The Last of Us__S1.overview: On the streets of a newly free Kansas City, Henry fights to protect his brother Sam from rebel soldiers who will stop at nothing to appease their ruthless leader. As her manhunt continues, Kathleen doubles down on her quest for revenge, while Ellie forms a meaningful friendship.

The Last of Us__S1.title: Kin
The Last of Us__S1.overview: After months of traveling, Joel and Ellie receive a grave warning about what lies ahead. Later, Ellie learns more about Joel's past – while Joel tries his best to forget.

The Last of Us__S1.title: Left Behind
The Last of Us__S1.overview: As Joel fights to survive, Ellie’s struggle to save him stirs memories of her life in a FEDRA orphanage. Weeks before meeting Joel, Ellie recalls joining her best friend Riley for a night to remember… one that will change the course of both of their lives – and the fate of the world – forever.

The Last of Us__S1.title: When We Are in Need
The Last of Us__S1.overview: After crossing paths with a vengeful group of survivors, Ellie's fighting spirit draws unwanted attention from its leader. Still battling for his life, a weakened Joel faces off with a hunting party out for blood.

The Last of Us__S1.title: Look for the Light
The Last of Us__S1.overview: After being pursued by Infected, a pregnant Anna places her trust in a lifelong friend. Years later, Ellie is forced to grapple with the emotional toll of her journey, while Joel faces a devastating decision of his own.

The Witcher__S1.title: The End's Beginning
The Witcher__S1.overview: Hostile townsfolk and a cunning mage greet Geralt in the town of Blaviken. Ciri finds her royal world upended when Nilfgaard sets its sights on Cintra.

The Witcher__S1.title: Four Marks
The Witcher__S1.overview: Bullied and neglected, Yennefer accidentally finds a means of escape. Geralt's hunt for a so-called devil goes to hell. Ciri seeks safety in numbers.

The Witcher__S1.title: Betrayer Moon
The Witcher__S1.overview: Geralt takes on another Witcher's unfinished business in a kingdom stalked by a ferocious beast. At a brutal cost, Yennefer forges a magical new future.

The Witcher__S1.title: Of Banquets, Bastards and Burials
The Witcher__S1.overview: Against his better judgment, Geralt accompanies Jaskier to a royal ball. Ciri wanders into an enchanted forest. Yennefer tries to protect her charges.

The Witcher__S1.title: Bottled Appetites
The Witcher__S1.overview: Heedless of warnings, Yennefer looks for a cure to restore what she's lost. Geralt inadvertently puts Jaskier in peril. The search for Ciri intensifies.

The Witcher__S1.title: Rare Species
The Witcher__S1.overview: A mysterious man tries to entice Geralt to join a hunt for a rampaging dragon, a quest that attracts a familiar face. Ciri questions who she can trust.

The Witcher__S1.title: Before a Fall
The Witcher__S1.overview: With the Continent at risk from Nilfgaard's rising power, Yennefer revisits her past, while Geralt reconsiders his obligation to the Law of Surprise.

The Witcher__S1.title: Much More
The Witcher__S1.overview: A terrifying pack of foes lays Geralt low. Yennefer and her fellow mages prepare to fight back. A shaken Ciri depends on the kindness of a stranger.

Stranger Things__S2.title: Chapter One: MADMAX
Stranger Things__S2.overview: As the town preps for Halloween, a high-scoring rival shakes things up at the arcade, and a skeptical Hopper inspects a field of rotting pumpkins.

Stranger Things__S2.title: Chapter Two: Trick or Treat, Freak
Stranger Things__S2.overview: After Will sees something terrible on trick-or-treat night, Mike wonders whether Eleven's still out there. Nancy wrestles with the truth about Barb.

Stranger Things__S2.title: Chapter Three: The Pollywog
Stranger Things__S2.overview: Dustin adopts a strange new pet, and Eleven grows increasingly impatient. A well-meaning Bob urges Will to stand up to his fears.

Stranger Things__S2.title: Chapter Four: Will the Wise
Stranger Things__S2.overview: An ailing Will opens up to Joyce -- with disturbing results. While Hopper digs for the truth, Eleven unearths a surprising discovery.

Stranger Things__S2.title: Chapter Five: Dig Dug
Stranger Things__S2.overview: Nancy and Jonathan swap conspiracy theories with a new ally as Eleven searches for someone from her past. “Bob the Brain” tackles a difficult problem.

Stranger Things__S2.title: Chapter Six: The Spy
Stranger Things__S2.overview: Will's connection to a shadowy evil grows stronger, but no one's quite sure how to stop it. Elsewhere, Dustin and Steve forge an unlikely bond.

Stranger Things__S2.title: Chapter Seven: The Lost Sister
Stranger Things__S2.overview: Psychic visions draw Eleven to a band of violent outcasts and an angry girl with a shadowy past.

Stranger Things__S2.title: Chapter Eight: The Mind Flayer
Stranger Things__S2.overview: An unlikely hero steps forward when a deadly development puts the Hawkins Lab on lockdown, trapping Will and several others inside.

Stranger Things__S2.title: Chapter Nine: The Gate
Stranger Things__S2.overview: Eleven makes plans to finish what she started while the survivors turn up the heat on the monstrous force that's holding Will hostage.

The Mandalorian__S1.title: Chapter 1: The Mandalorian
The Mandalorian__S1.overview: A Mandalorian bounty hunter tracks a target for a well-paying client.

The Mandalorian__S1.title: Chapter 2: The Child
The Mandalorian__S1.overview: Target in-hand, the Mandalorian must now contend with scavengers.

The Mandalorian__S1.title: Chapter 3: The Sin
The Mandalorian__S1.overview: The battered Mandalorian returns to his client for reward.

The Mandalorian__S1.title: Chapter 4: Sanctuary
The Mandalorian__S1.overview: The Mandalorian teams up with an ex-soldier to protect a village from raiders.

The Mandalorian__S1.title: Chapter 5: The Gunslinger
The Mandalorian__S1.overview: The Mandalorian helps a rookie bounty hunter who is in over his head.

The Mandalorian__S1.title: Chapter 6: The Prisoner
The Mandalorian__S1.overview: The Mandalorian joins a crew of mercenaries on a dangerous mission.

The Mandalorian__S1.title: Chapter 7: The Reckoning
The Mandalorian__S1.overview: An old rival extends an invitation for The Mandalorian to make peace.

The Mandalorian__S1.title: Chapter 8: Redemption
The Mandalorian__S1.overview: The Mandalorian comes face-to-face with an unexpected enemy.

Wednesday__S1.title: Wednesday's Child Is Full of Woe
Wednesday__S1.overview: When a deliciously wicked prank gets Wednesday expelled, her parents ship her off to Nevermore Academy, the boarding school where they fell in love.

Wednesday__S1.title: Woe Is the Loneliest Number
Wednesday__S1.overview: The sheriff questions Wednesday about the night's strange happenings. Later, Wednesday faces off against a fierce rival in the cutthroat Poe Cup race.

Wednesday__S1.title: Friend or Woe
Wednesday__S1.overview: Wednesday stumbles on a secret society. During Outreach Day, Nevermore's outcasts mingle with Jericho's normies in Pilgrim World. Fudge, anyone?

Wednesday__S1.title: Woe What a Night
Wednesday__S1.overview: Wednesday asks Xavier to the Rave'N dance, sparking Tyler's jealousy — but Thing's got something up his sleeve. Meanwhile, Eugene stakes out the cave.

Wednesday__S1.title: You Reap What You Woe
Wednesday__S1.overview: During Parents Weekend, Wednesday digs into her family's past — and accidentally gets her dad arrested. Enid feels the pressure to "wolf out."

Wednesday__S1.title: Quid Pro Woe
Wednesday__S1.overview: Wednesday's friends throw her a surprise birthday party. They mean well... but she'd much rather mark the miserable occasion by solving the murders.

Wednesday__S1.title: If You Don't Woe Me by Now
Wednesday__S1.overview: Kooky Uncle Fester pays a visit and shares his theory about the monster. Wednesday begrudgingly agrees to a date with Tyler at Crackstone's crypt.

Wednesday__S1.title: A Murder of Woes
Wednesday__S1.overview: Wednesday lands in trouble with Principal Weems, but that's just the start of her problems. To fight an ancient evil, she'll need all her friends’ help.

Daredevil-Born Again__S1.title: Heaven's Half Hour
Daredevil-Born Again__S1.overview: Matt Murdock gives up the mask. Wilson Fisk has his sights set to new heights.

Daredevil-Born Again__S1.title: Optics
Daredevil-Born Again__S1.overview: Matt Murdock gets a new client who's more than he claims to be. Fisk learns the power of optics.

Daredevil-Born Again__S1.title: The Hollow of His Hand
Daredevil-Born Again__S1.overview: The trial of Hector Ayala begins. Fisk's old business associates seek to claim his vacant mantle.

Daredevil-Born Again__S1.title: Sic Semper Systema
Daredevil-Born Again__S1.overview: Matt Murdock and Wilson Fisk's darker halves fight to be unleashed.

Daredevil-Born Again__S1.title: With Interest
Daredevil-Born Again__S1.overview: A day in the life of Matt Murdock gets intense, forcing him to team up with a familiar face.

Daredevil-Born Again__S1.title: Excessive Force
Daredevil-Born Again__S1.overview: When a serial killer terrorizes the streets of New York, the city needs a savior.

Daredevil-Born Again__S1.title: Art for Art's Sake
Daredevil-Born Again__S1.overview: Daredevil is back and races Fisk to stop Muse from killing again.

Daredevil-Born Again__S1.title: Isle of Joy
Daredevil-Born Again__S1.overview: At his inaugural Black and White Ball, Mayor Fisk tightens his grip on New York City.

Daredevil-Born Again__S1.title: Straight to Hell
Daredevil-Born Again__S1.overview: Mayor Fisk becomes Mayor Kingpin, and Daredevil is unleashed as chaos takes over the city.

Breaking Bad__S1.title: Pilot
Breaking Bad__S1.overview: When an unassuming high school chemistry teacher discovers he has a rare form of lung cancer, he decides to team up with a former student and create a top of the line crystal meth in a used RV, to provide for his family once he is gone.

Breaking Bad__S1.title: Cat's in the Bag...
Breaking Bad__S1.overview: Walt and Jesse attempt to tie up loose ends. The desperate situation gets more complicated with the flip of a coin. Walt's wife, Skyler, becomes suspicious of Walt's strange behavior.

Breaking Bad__S1.title: ...And the Bag's in the River
Breaking Bad__S1.overview: Walter fights with Jesse over his drug use, causing him to leave Walter alone with their captive, Krazy-8. Meanwhile, Hank has a scared straight moment with Walter Jr. after his aunt discovers he has been smoking pot. Also, Skylar is upset when Walter stays away from home.

Breaking Bad__S1.title: Cancer Man
Breaking Bad__S1.overview: Walter finally tells his family that he has been stricken with cancer. Meanwhile, the DEA believes Albuquerque has a new, big time player to worry about. Meanwhile, a worthy recipient is the target of a depressed Walter's anger, and Jesse makes a surprise visit to his parents home.

Breaking Bad__S1.title: Gray Matter
Breaking Bad__S1.overview: Walter and Skyler attend a former colleague's party. Jesse tries to free himself from the drugs, while Skyler organizes an intervention.

Breaking Bad__S1.title: Crazy Handful of Nothin'
Breaking Bad__S1.overview: The side effects of chemo begin to plague Walt. Meanwhile, the DEA rounds up suspected dealers.

Breaking Bad__S1.title: A No Rough Stuff Type Deal
Breaking Bad__S1.overview: Walter accepts his new identity as a drug dealer after a PTA meeting. Elsewhere, Jesse decides to put his aunt's house on the market and Skyler is the recipient of a baby shower.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Seven Thirty-Seven
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Walt and Jesse are vividly reminded of Tuco’s volatile nature, and try to figure a way out of their business partnership. Hank attempts to mend fences between the estranged Marie and Skyler.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Grilled
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Walt and Jesse find themselves in close quarters with an unhinged Tuco. Marie and Hank comfort Skyler, who is distraught over Walt’s disappearance. Hank pays a visit to Mrs. Pinkman on some not-so-official business.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Bit by a Dead Bee
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Walt and Jesse become short on cash when they try to cover their tracks. Meanwhile, the DEA has a lead that could them straight to Walt and Jesse.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Down
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Walt attempts to reconnect with his family, while Jesse struggles to rebuild his life.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Breakage
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Hank suffers from the aftermath of his encounter with Tuco. Meanwhile, Jesse hires a crew to get their product out on the streets.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Peekaboo
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Walt's secret is in jeopardy when Skyler thanks Gretchen for paying for his treatment.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Negro y Azul
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Jesse and Walt discuss expanding into new territories; Hank struggles to fit in; Skyler pursues a new job opportunity; Jesse gets to know his landlord.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Better Call Saul
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Walt and Jesse seek advice from a shady attorney when Badger gets in trouble with the law; the DEA believes they have caught up with "Heisenberg" ; Hank returns.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: 4 Days Out
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Walt and his family wait for news after he undergoes a PET-CT scan. Walt follows Saul's advice; Jesse's relationship with Jane is put on hold when he and Walt head to the desert for a marathon of cooking.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Over
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Walt and Hank get into a heated argument at a party. Skyler opens up to her boss. Jane hides her relationship with Jesse from her father.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Mandala
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: As the end of her pregnancy finds Skyler conflicted about her feelings, a dealer's death forces Walt to look for somewhere to unload a load of meth.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: Phoenix
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: As Walt explores money laundering options, he and Jesse spar over the profits from their latest deal. Jesse and Jane clash with her father. Walt makes a fatal decision.

Breaking Bad__S2.title: ABQ
Breaking Bad__S2.overview: Skyler confronts Walt about his secrecy; Jesse falls apart; and Jane's grief-stricken father takes action that results in further tragedy.
